records.summary: The about page is thin on genuine trust signals — no named team members, no trade body logos, no insurance or licence numbers, and no customer reviews. The site mentions a 12-month guarantee and 'no fix no fee' but provides no verifiable credentials to back up these claims.
records.topOpportunity: Build a trust-focused redesign incorporating Google Reviews integration, MLA membership badge display, named engineer profiles with photos, and visible licence/insurance credentials to dramatically improve conversion from suspicious London searchers.
records.notes: A high-volume emergency locksmith serving all of London with almost zero verifiable trust signals — a textbook prospect for a conversion-led web redesign pitch.
